info.name: AxiomNizam - Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete and comprehensive API testing collection for AxiomNizam - covering all endpoints including health, auth, CRUD, dynamic queries, transformations, admin, and notifications

request.description: Check if the service is healthy (no auth required)
Check status of all database connections (no auth required)
Login with username and password to get JWT token
Validate if current token is valid
Get status of all tokens (admin only)
Get a specific user from MySQL by ID
Create a new user in MySQL (admin only)
Update an existing user in MySQL (admin only)
Delete a user from MySQL (admin only)
